29161.title: Rock Solid Playlist
29161.description: Grab your air guitar and party hard to our rock solid playlist!

29162.title: Global Video Premiere:Alessia Cara
29162.description: We are excited to have the first play of 'Sweet Dream', the brand new video from Alessia Cara.

29163.title: The Weeknd X Ariana X Justin
29163.description: Check out these huge tracks from three of the biggest acts on the planet, The Weekend, Ariana Grande and Justin Bieber! We love them!

29164.title: Hot Right Now!
29164.description: We bring you the very hottest music videos in the world right now!

29165.title: World Stage: Green Day
29165.description: Legendary rock band Green Day perform an explosive set in front of 10000 thrilled fans in Seville exclusively for MTV World Stage including the tracks Good Riddance, Father of All and American Idiot.

29166.title: Kings Of Leon: Rocks Special
29166.description: Jack Saunders chats to Caleb and Nathan from Kings Of Leon about their huge new album, getting back on tour, and playing golf!

29167.title: MTV Asks Black Eyed Peas
29167.description: Becca Dudley chats to Black Eyed Peas while they play vintage arcade games - and puts questions to them from you guys, their fans around the world.

29168.title: High Definition Hits!
29168.description: Nothing but the best with these High Definition Hits!
